title: Terrarian Pickaxes
description: This texture pack turns all Minecraft pickaxes into Terraria pickaxes!
body:
# ABOUT
**This texture pack turns all pickaxes into Terraria pickaxes.**

The changelog is below.

<details>
<summary>Item List</summary>
  
- Wooden pickaxe - Copper pickaxe
- Stone pickaxe - Silver pickaxe
- Copper pickaxe - Tungsten pickaxe
- Iron pickaxe - Molten pickaxe
- Golden pickaxe - Orichalcum pickaxe
- Diamond pickaxe - Chlorophyte pickaxe
- netherite pickaxe - Luminite pickaxes

</details>

dig, dig, and only dig!
